lastFeature: Interactive Command Reference — searchable command cheat sheet with 15 commands, 6 categories, copy-to-clipboard, 16 tests

sauravcode: sauravapi — serve .srv functions as REST API endpoints
sauravtest — test runner for .srv programs (discover, run, setup/teardown, JSON export)
sauravmetrics — code complexity analyzer (cyclomatic complexity, maintainability index, LOC, nesting depth, JSON/CSV export, 22 tests)
sauravdbg — interactive step-through debugger (step/next/continue, breakpoints with conditions, var inspection, call stack, watchlist, source view, restart). 33 tests.
GraphVisual: NetworkReportGenerator — self-contained HTML network analysis report with SVG charts, health score, degree/edge-type/top-nodes visualizations, 12 tests
Interactive Graph Explorer — load JSON, force-directed layout, ego network highlighting, shortest path, search, community detection, PNG export
VoronoiMap: vormap_benchmark — performance benchmarking module (NN, area, EstimateSUM, scaling analysis)
LOO cross-validation for interpolation methods (compare nearest/IDW/natural, error metrics, SVG chart, CSV export)
gif-captcha: Interactive configuration wizard (config.html) — step-by-step setup, code generation, score dashboard
CaptchaAnomalyDetector — statistical anomaly detection (z-score, IQR, bursts, geo shift, changepoints, EMA)
agentlens: CLI tool (agentlens command) — 10 subcommands: sessions, session, costs, events, export, analytics, health, compare, alerts, status
Session Guardrails — constraint validation (token budgets, duration, tool allow/blocklists, model restrictions, error thresholds, custom predicates, suite reports, 39 tests)
BioBots: Data Integrity Auditor (integrity.html) — 18 validation rules, summary dashboard, rule chart, filterable findings, CSV export
Interactive Bioink Compatibility Matrix — heatmap, dimension breakdown, rankings, add custom bioinks, recommendations
Print Recipe Builder — target-based parameter optimization with 5 presets, composite scoring, recipe cards, distributions, 33 tests
Vidly: Global Search bar — navbar search + SearchController querying movies, customers, and rentals with unified results view
Customer Insights dashboard — loyalty score, spending, patterns, genres, timeline, rental history. 16 tests.
Movie Quiz — interactive trivia with difficulty levels, categories, speed bonus, leaderboard, daily challenge, hints, 12 tests
agenticchat: Word Cloud visualization panel — interactive word frequency cloud, role-colored, click-to-search (Ctrl+Shift+W)
ChatGPT conversation importer — parse mapping tree, extract messages, create sessions. 17 tests.
Prompt Chain Runner — multi-step prompt chains with variable substitution, 3 presets, import/export, 18 tests
prompt: PromptPlayground — interactive HTML playground for testing prompt templates (live preview, dark mode, token stats, copy, library import)
PromptSchemaGenerator — fluent structured output schema builder (JSON Schema + prompt instructions + example generation, 14 tests)
WinSentinel: Attack Path Analyzer — chains findings into multi-step attack paths (6 kill chain stages), exploitability scoring, chokepoint remediation priorities, CLI + 14 tests
Score Forecast CLI — predict future security scores with trend analysis, confidence intervals, module projections, risk factors, target estimation, 9 tests
FeedReader: Text-to-Speech article reader — AVSpeechSynthesizer with play/pause/stop, voice selection, language detection
ArticleExpiryManager — auto-cleanup for stale articles with configurable policies, dry-run, sweep execution, 16 tests
Ocaml-sample-code: Example Explorer (explorer.html) — browsable catalog of all 90 examples with 12 categories, search, sort, difficulty badges, inline code preview
everything: Packing List Screen — template-based trip packing UI with category grouping, progress tracking, weight breakdown, readiness checks
Vehicle Maintenance Tracker — 4-tab screen (Vehicles, Service Log, Alerts, Costs) with add/log/update dialogs, sample data, 12 tests
ai: Fleet Snapshot command — kubectl-style worker overview with table/JSON/CSV output, sorting, filtering
Interactive Simulation Playground — HTML page with parameter sliders, client-side simulation, tree/timeline/depth visualizations, 5 presets, 10 tests
getagentbox: Performance Benchmarks (benchmarks.js) — 12 task comparisons across 4 categories with animated bars, filters, summary stats, 14 tests
Interactive Command Reference — searchable/filterable command cheat sheet with 15 commands, 6 categories, examples, copy-to-clipboard, tips, 16 tests
